libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image runtime verification on JDK 25, ensure the generated/updated test build applies the same nativeTest runtime system properties for 5.0.1 as 5.0.0: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Tests should create a local Vert.x HttpServer and WebClient for GET/POST/forms/multipart/cache/session coverage; no external service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient is present in the artifact but depends on optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2; avoid covering OAuth2-specific APIs unless intentionally adding that optional dependency.
Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative for whether the Netty/JDK 25 system properties are still sufficient.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 still resolves Vert.x Core 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final, matching the existing 5.0.0 native-run workaround for Netty 4.2.x on Java 25; meaningful WebClient coverage can otherwise use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server without Docker or extra mandatory dependencies.
